flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Georgia Southern University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Georgia Southern University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (30.5% → 35.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Georgia Southern University rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 (43.0% → 47.3%).
